title: Rule-Notification
description: JSON schema for creating or updating a Pega notification rule (Rule-Notification). Only authored and identity fields are included; system-managed and versioning fields are omitted.

pyClassName.description: The Pega class this notification applies to (e.g., 'MyOrg-MyApp-Work-MyCase', 'Work-', '@baseclass').

pyLabel.description: Human-readable display label shown in Dev Studio and notification preferences.

pyRuleName.description: Internal rule name — auto-derived from pyPurpose by the server. Do not set directly.

pyPurpose.description: The notification's purpose / key identifier (PascalCase or camelCase, no spaces). pyRuleName is derived from this value.

pyRuleSet.description: Ruleset the rule is saved to.

pyMessage.description: Reference to a Rule-Obj-FieldValue (with pyFieldName = pyNotificationMessage) that supplies the notification text. Must resolve on the applies-to class hierarchy. Safe OOTB value: 'pyAddPulsePost'.

pyMessageType.description: Message body source type. Prompt values on Rule-Notification.pyMessageType are 'RichText' (Custom) and 'Correspondence'. Auto-generated Send Notification rules use 'RichText'; legacy rules usually omit the field.

pyNotificationSubject.description: Default subject line for App Studio Send Notification step.

pyTempText.description: Notification body text used by App Studio Send Notification step.

pzIsAutoGenerated.description: 'true' when the rule was generated by App Studio (Send Notification step).

pyDescription.description: Developer-facing description of the notification's purpose.

pyUsage.description: Notes describing where this notification is referenced.

pyCategory.description: Notification category. Required on create. Observed Rule-Notification category values are 'Default', 'AssignedToMe', and 'Mention'.

pyShowInUserPreference.description: 'true' to expose the notification in user notification-preference settings.

pyDoNotShowInPreference.description: 'true' to hide the notification from the user-preference UI.

pyMuteNotification.description: 'true' to suppress delivery without removing the rule.

pyDPClass.description: Top-level mirror of the first recipient's pyDPClass — class returned by the recipient data page or page list. Newer rules also populate this on the entry inside pzRecipients.

pyRecipientDataPage.description: Top-level mirror of the first recipient's pyRecipientDataPage — recipient data page name. Newer rules also populate this on the entry inside pzRecipients.

pyRecipientProperty.description: Top-level mirror of the first recipient's primary identifier property reference (e.g., '.pyUserIdentifier').

pyChannelsList.description: Page group of delivery channels keyed by subscript (Email / Gadget / MobilePush). At least one channel should be enabled. If a channel is omitted from create payloads, Infinity may auto-create it as enabled; include the channel and set pyEnableChannel='false' to explicitly keep it off.

pzRecipients.description: Recipient definitions used by Pega 8.4+ notifications. Each entry describes one recipient source. Use this for new rules.

pzRecipientDataPages.description: Legacy recipients array (pre-8.4 / Pega-Social / Pega-ProcessEngine). Same item shape as pzRecipients.

pzRecipientDataPageParameters.description: Top-level mirror of the first recipient's data-page parameter map (e.g., {'WorkObjectID': '.pzInsKey'}).

pyAdvancedParameters.description: Name/value pairs passed to the notification at runtime (Advanced tab).

pyPagesAndClasses.description: Pages and Classes table — declares named pages referenced by message or recipient parameters.

pyParameters.description: Parameters table for the notification rule.

pzMessageParameters.description: Map of message parameter name to source expression. Keys must match the parameters declared on the referenced pyMessage rule and appear in pzOrderedMessageParams.

pzOrderedMessageParams.description: Ordered list of message parameter names — controls runtime binding order.

pzRuleParameters.description: Rule parameter metadata (one entry per parameter declared on the notification).

RecipientDef.description: One recipient source. Required fields depend on pyRecipientContext (see allOf).

pyRecipientContext.description: How recipients are resolved. CURRENTPAGE = use the running page. DATAPAGE = fetch from a data page. PAGELIST = iterate an embedded page list/group. Legacy default when omitted is CURRENTPAGE.

pyClassName.description: Class context for the recipient page reference.

pyDPClass.description: Class returned by the recipient data page (DATAPAGE) or class of the iterated page list (PAGELIST). Common values: Data-Admin-Operator-ID, Data-Party, Index-WorkPartyUri.

pyRecipientDataPage.description: Recipient data page name. Required when pyRecipientContext = DATAPAGE (e.g., 'D_pxGetCaseFollowers').

pyRecipientContextPage.description: Property reference to the embedded page list/group. Required when pyRecipientContext = PAGELIST. Standard Work- value: '.pyWorkParty'.

pyRecipientTypeInAppStudio.description: Display label shown in App Studio for this recipient row (e.g., 'Followers').

pyRecipientProperties.description: Recipient identifier mappings — at least one entry required.

pzRecipientDataPageParameters.description: Parameters passed to the recipient data page or context page (e.g., {'WorkObjectID': '.pzInsKey'}).

pzRuleParameters.description: Parameter metadata for the recipient data page.

RecipientPropertyDef.description: One recipient identifier mapping. pyNotificationRecipientType picks the channel (Operator vs Email).

pyNotificationRecipientType.description: Identifier kind. 'Operator' drives in-app + push. 'Email' drives the email channel only.

pyNotificationRecipientProperty.description: Property reference holding the identifier value (e.g., '.pyUserIdentifier' for Operator, '.pyEmail' for Email).

EmailChannel.description: Email channel configuration. Body comes from a Rule-Obj-Corr referenced by pyCorrespondence.

then.x-pega-condition: Email channel requires pyCorrespondence and pySubject when pyEnableChannel is 'true'

pyEnableChannel.description: Enable/disable Email delivery. Default is 'true' when omitted.

pyCorrespondence.description: Rule-Obj-Corr name (base name only — actual rule is typically '{Name} Email' for auto-generated notifications).

pySubject.description: Email subject — literal string with @{Param} tokens, or a Rule-Obj-FieldValue reference.

pzCorrSubjectParameters.description: Map of subject parameter name to source expression.

pyEnableChannel.description: Enable/disable Gadget delivery. Default is 'true' when omitted.

pyDisplayStream.description: Section rule that renders the in-app card. OOTB values: 'pyShowNotificationDefault' (most rules), 'ShowChildNotificationDefault' (child/grouped), 'pyShowNotificationForMemberJoin' (member-join notifications).

then.x-pega-condition: MobilePush channel requires pyPushMessage when pyEnableChannel is 'true'

pyEnableChannel.description: Enable/disable MobilePush delivery. Default is 'true' when omitted.

pyPushMessage.description: Rule-Obj-FieldValue reference supplying the push body text.

pyPushTitle.description: Rule-Obj-FieldValue reference supplying a separate push title shown above the body.

pzPushMessageParameters.description: Map of push message parameter name to source expression.

pzPushTitleParameters.description: Map of push title parameter name to source expression.
